filesModified.purpose: Added preset-only pill bar (.archive-preset-filters) rendered when displayFilters=false but preset filters are active. Uses <span> elements (not <button>), omits .archive-remove-filter and Clear All, uses .archive-preset-pill class for CSS targeting.
Added presetFiltersSelector constant. Added AJAX response handler section to replace .archive-preset-filters content from response HTML, keeping preset pills in sync after pagination/load-more.
Added .archive-preset-pill styles: cursor:default, transition:none, background:transparent on base and :hover to suppress all interactive affordances.

warnings: react-hooks/exhaustive-deps on Archive.tsx useEffect and useSelect - pre-existing, matches pattern in other blocks

syncStatus.notes: Root wrapper mismatch warning is a pre-existing false positive (validator sees <BlockControls> as first fragment element). All sync checks pass.

testPage.notes: Existing test page already includes 'Resources Archive - Preset Filters (Filters Hidden)' variation which covers the displayFilters=false+presetFilters scenario that exercises the new preset pill bar.

fixesApplied.description: Added separate .archive-preset-filters block after filter form conditional. Renders <span class='archive-preset-pill'> elements without .archive-remove-filter div or Clear All button. Conditional: !$displayFilters && !empty($preset_filters) && $has_selected_option.

Added var presetFiltersSelector = '.archive-preset-filters' selector constant. Added block in loadResults() AJAX handler to update .archive-preset-filters innerHTML from response, parallel to existing activeFilters update.
Added .archive-preset-pill rules: cursor:default, transition:none, background:transparent. Added :hover override to prevent any background/border/color changes on hover.
